message.content:
@startuml
!theme plain

title SOURCE's Class Diagram

package "model" as model {
  package "data" as data {
    package "source" as source {
      class "Collector" as Collector {
        +Collector()
        +getDatumLinkListByTree()
        +getEntityDescription()
        +getEntityName()
        +getQualifiers()
        +getReferences()
        +getSingleStatement()
        +getStatementList()
        +triggerLoad()
        +triggerSave()
      }

      class "WebCollector" as WebCollector {
        +loaded : Entities
        -gson : Gson
        -seen : ArrayList<Entities>
        +WebCollector()
        +getDatumLinkListByTree()
        +getEntityDescription()
        +getEntityName()
        +getQualifiers()
        +getReferences()
        +getSingleStatement()
        +getStatementList()
        +triggerLoad()
        +triggerSave()
        +getJson()
        -formatURL()
        -iterateSnaks()
        -tryGetQualifiers()
      }

      class "LocalCollector" as LocalCollector {
        +LocalCollector()
        +triggerSave()
        +getJson()
      }

      class "LocalRepository" as LocalRepository {
        -file : File
        +LocalRepository()
        +load()
        +save()
      }

      Collector <|-- WebCollector
      Collector --o LocalRepository : repository
      WebCollector <|-- LocalCollector
    }
  }
}

@enduml
